title: Subitem column missing

posts.author: Debbie (Deborah Funmi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good day, everyone! I’m a freelancer that helps a variety of companies set up their Monday.com accounts. I’m now working on a Monday account (still on the pro free trial), but I’ve noticed that the subitem column is missing, yet the columns are visible on another client’s board. Has anyone else have a similar experience?

Screenshot 2022-05-09 at 1.14.50 PM2880×1800 352 KB

Uploading: Screenshot 2022-05-09 at 1.15.01 PM.png…
